title: jasonia foetida
intro: Jasonia foetida, also known as stinking chamomile, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasonia foetida include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and soothing of skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Jasonia foetida include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
